title: Bank impersonation texts reported in Northside
description: Multiple residents received text messages claiming their debit cards were locked and asking them to click a login link.

title: Fake IRS email targeting local residents
description: Residents received emails claiming they owed back taxes and must pay immediately via wire transfer to avoid arrest.

title: Suspicious login page mimicking local credit union
description: A fraudulent website nearly identical to Northside Credit Union's login page was reported by three members.

title: Suspicious utility shutoff calls targeting seniors
description: Callers claimed to represent the electric company and demanded immediate gift card payment to prevent service interruption.

title: Water company impersonation calls
description: Residents reported calls from someone claiming to be the city water department demanding payment or face same-day shutoff.

title: Medicare card renewal phone scam
description: Callers posing as Medicare representatives asked seniors to confirm their Social Security numbers to receive new cards.

title: Lottery winnings robocall campaign
description: Automated calls informed residents they won a prize and must provide banking information to claim it.

title: Local gym chain customer data exposed
description: A regional gym chain reported unauthorized access to member records including emails, phone numbers, and payment info.

title: Restaurant loyalty app breach reported
description: Users of a local restaurant loyalty app were notified that their account credentials may have been compromised.

title: Fake contractor overcharging elderly residents
description: A contractor approached several elderly homeowners offering driveway repairs, collected large upfront payments, and never returned.

title: Counterfeit event tickets sold online
description: Residents reported purchasing tickets to a local concert through an unofficial site and being denied entry at the venue.

title: Stranger harassment reported near community park
description: Several residents reported being followed and verbally harassed by an unknown individual near Riverside Park in the evenings.

title: Unsecured construction site attracting trespassers
description: Residents reported that a construction site on Maple Ave has been left unsecured overnight, with minors observed entering the area.
